chapter_context.summary: Josiah reigns righteously, purges idols, and repairs the Temple, where the Book of the Law is found; Josiah repents and reads the Law.

outline.text: Josiah Reigns Righteously; Purges High Places in Israel and Judah
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Josiah Reigns Righteously; Purges High Places in Israel and Judah (34:1-7), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Josiah Orders Temple Repairs under Hilkiah
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Josiah Orders Temple Repairs under Hilkiah (34:8-13), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Book of the Law Found; Josiah Rends His Clothes
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Book of the Law Found; Josiah Rends His Clothes (34:14-21), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Huldah the Prophetess Prophesies Wrath on Judah but Peace to Josiah
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Huldah the Prophetess Prophesies Wrath on Judah but Peace to Josiah (34:22-28), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Josiah Reads the Law to the Assembly and Renews the Covenant
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Josiah Reads the Law to the Assembly and Renews the Covenant (34:29-33), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

key_themes.title: The Temple Centered Kingdom
key_themes.description: The presence of God's glory in the Temple is the absolute center of national blessing and life.

key_themes.title: Immediate Retribution and Reform
key_themes.description: Good kings who seek the LORD experience immediate victory and peace, while unfaithfulness leads to immediate warning and exile.

devotional.question: How do the events of Chapter 34 prompt you to humble yourself, seek God's face, and turn away from compromise?
What practical reforms can you make in your daily walk to ensure your heart is dedicated to God?

cultural_historical.title: The Levitical Worship System
cultural_historical.text: Unlike the Book of Kings, Chronicles highlights the roles of singers, Levites, and liturgical musicians in the temple's daily administration.
